message:
feat(stdlib): Complete all partial implementations for 100% coverage

- deque: Add indexRange with start/stop params for index(x, start, stop)
- timedelta: Add create() with all Python params (days, seconds, microseconds,
  milliseconds, minutes, hours, weeks) and fromWeeks/Hours/Minutes/Seconds/Milliseconds
- defaultdict: Add items(), getWithDefault(), setdefault(), pop(), popWithDefault(),
  update(), copyDict(), len() for full dict compatibility
- OrderedDict: Add values(), items(), contains(), update(), len(), pop(),
  popWithDefault(), getWithDefault(), fromkeys() for full dict compatibility
- os: Fix getpid/getppid to use std.posix.system for all POSIX platforms
- docs: Update plan to reflect 100% completion of partial items
